titleStmt.title: SII 34.93: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 93. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the Gaṇapati shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājēndra III, 14th year, Vṛiśchika, badi 5, Thursday, Punarvasu = A.D. 1250, November 6, Thursday.

The trustees of Tirukkāṟkōtiśvaram temple assigned some land in a location called Tiruchiṟṟambala-nallūr-Kaṭṭaḷai for the living (jīvana-śēsham) of the gardeners tending a flower-garden of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājEnttiracOḻa devarkku yāṇṭu patiṉālāvatu vṛśvikanāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu
pañcamiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇar
pūcattu nāḷ vaṭakarai vikkirama cōḻavaḷanāṭṭu
viṟaikkūṟṟattu śrīkāmatavalliccaruppēti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tirukkā
ṟ kōṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyil tāṉattōm Innāyaṉārkku tirunantavaṉañ
ceyyun tirumēṉikaḷukku jīvaṉaśeṣamākak kuṭutta tirucciṟṟampala nallūr ka
ṭṭaḷaiyil kōtaṇṭarāma peruvāykkāl kīḻkarait tuṇṭattu nīṅkal
nilattu tirumuṉpu tirunantavaṉamāy tiruppaḷḷittāmam Ākki paṟittu pōnta Ittiruna
ntavaṉam Iḷaiyamutaliyār viḷainilam Āka tirutti Itukku talaimāṟu tirunantavaṉam vē
ṟē Ākki tiruppaḷḷittāmam paṟittu pōtukaiyil Ittirunantavaṉaṅkaḷ ceyyun tirumē
nikaḷukku muṉpu tirunantavaṉamāy tiruttu peṟṟa tiruttoṇṭa tokaiyaṉ viḷākam Eṉṟu pērkūvap
paṭṭa � 1 mā 9 3 mā Innilam Oru māvaraik kāṇiyum Innāḷ mutal śandrādittavarai Ittirunantava
ṉaṅkaḷ ceyyun tirumēṉikaḷukku jīvanaśeṣamāka kuṭuttōm Innilam Ippaṭi Aṉupavittu
kkoḷḷavum Ittirumēṉikaḷukkē śeṣamākavum Ippaṭi Innilam kuṭuttamaiyil Ippaṭi Oḻiya
ceytāruṇṭākil civatturōkiyarākavum Ittaṉmam nōkkiṉavarkaḷ nāyaṉār tirukkāṟkōṭi
śvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tiruvuḷḷattukkum(m) śrīmāheśvarar tiruviḷattukkum priyamāka tirunantavaṉa
ṅkaḷ ceytār peṟum palam peṟakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭi niścayittu kalveṭṭikkuṭuttō
m tirunantavaṉaṅkaḷ ceyyun tirumēṉikaḷukku Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumuṉpu tiruñāṉa campan
taṉ tirumaṭattu kumpuṭṭu Irukkum kuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiya kūttape
rumāḷ Eḻuttu Innāyaṉār tirukkōyil tāṉattōm Ippaṭikku Ivai tēvar kaṉmi tēvan tiruvumuṭaiyāṉ vaṟaṭṭakaṟintāṉ ti
ruccimala paṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kōyil kaṇakku koṭi ruṭaiyāṉ nampiyārūraṉ kampakkātaṉ Āṉa Aracavanta
ṇappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṟaṭṭākaṟintāṉ ṉ poṟkōyil paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ālā
lacuntara paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu :—
Digital edition of SII 34.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
